markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content performance, new metrics, and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Metrics Proposed:** GrowthX proposed new metrics (GeoScore, competitive gap, referral traffic) to better measure visibility and clicks, addressing the current gap between high citation shares and low visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [**Content Strategy Shift:** The strategy will shift from the narrow "LLM" focus to the broader "AI" category to better align with Galileo's product offering, while still targeting LLM-specific keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [**Quality Control Focus:** Internal linking is a top priority for improvement. GrowthX will create a new artifact listing core resources (pillar pages, V2 docs, product pages) to guide the AI workflow and ensure proper linking.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [**Performance Update:** January performance was flat vs. the December peak, a positive result for a typically slow month. ChatGPT remains the primary LLM traffic driver.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)

## Topics

### Performance & Visibility Gap

  - [**January Performance:** Flat vs. the December peak, which is a positive outcome for a typically slow month.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [**LLM Referrals:** Tapered slightly from Oct–Jan.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
      - [**Driver Mix:** Consistent → ChatGPT \> Perplexity \> Other platforms.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [**Visibility Gap:** A key challenge, as high citation shares are not translating to high visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
      - [**Goal:** Close the gap with competitors (e.g., Horizon, Smith) by getting Galileo into the right conversations.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)

### Proposed Metrics for Executive Reporting

  - [GrowthX proposed new metrics to provide a clearer picture of visibility and clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [**GeoScore:** A weighted formula combining various scores into a single metric for executive reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [**Referral Traffic:** Tracks monthly sessions from citations to measure actual clicks, addressing the gap between citations and traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [**Competitive Gap:** A metric to track Galileo's performance against key competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [**Action:** Galileo will review the concepts with Jason to determine the best approach for executive and board reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)

### Content Strategy: Broadening Focus to "AI"

  - [**Problem:** The current "LLM" focus is too narrow, representing only a subset of Galileo's product offering.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [**Solution:** Shift the strategy to the broader "AI evaluation" and "AI observability" categories.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Better aligns content with the full product offering and messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**Execution:** Refresh existing LLM-focused articles and create new content targeting the broader AI category.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
      - [**Risk Mitigation:** Differentiate content by use case, industry, or persona to prevent keyword cannibalization.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Content Quality: Improving Internal Linking

  - [**Problem:** Internal linking is weak and does not follow SEO best practices.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
      - [**Impact:** Missed opportunities to drive users to core resources.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [**Solution:** Guide the AI workflow to link to specific, high-value resources.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [**Pillar Pages:** For broad topics like "AI observability" or "AI evals."](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
      - [**V2 Docs:** For technical concepts (e.g., agentic metrics) to encourage product exploration.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
      - [**Product Pages:** For features (e.g., Signals, Luna 2) to drive demos and sign-ups.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [**Execution:** GrowthX will create a new artifact listing these core resources to guide the AI workflow, followed by manual validation.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Galileo:**](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
      - [Review proposed metrics with Jason to select the best for executive reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
      - [Review the listicle topic list, providing feedback on which to pursue or refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
      - [Clear the content review queue (target: 2–3 articles/day).](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
  - [**Carrie (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
      - [Continue work on content recategorization.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
      - [Create the internal linking artifact listing core resources.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
      - [Pull data to prioritize articles for refreshing.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [**Both:**](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
      - [Continue weekly syncs for now, with a potential shift to biweekly meetings in the future.](https://fathom.video/share/o1HnfQuqNtcebyxHc-C-WFgyy5Mu6VC7?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
